title: Filipino Corn Wrap
description: A tasty and easy-to-make snack or light meal, perfect for a quick and satisfying bite. Inspired by Filipino cuisine.

ingredients.name: Filipino-style BBQ sauce
ingredients.notes: or any other sweet and spicy sauce

instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Place the flaky pastry wrapper in the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the cooked pastry to a plate and spread the BBQ sauce evenly over it.
Top the sauce with the corn kernels, shredded cheese, scallions, and cilantro.
Fold the pastry in half to enclose the filling and press the edges to seal.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
